description: Repo-owned portable Codex skill bundle for Mythic Edge project work.
authority_note: These skills are instruction helpers. Repo authority remains AGENTS.md, docs/agent_rules.yml, docs/agent_constitution.md, current issues, contracts, accepted ADRs, and tests.

included_skills.name: openai-current-docs
portable_adjustments: Replaced machine-specific openai-docs path with the skill name.

excluded_local_skills.name: .system
excluded_local_skills.reason: Codex-managed bundled system skills are installed by Codex, not owned by this repo.

excluded_local_skills.name: pdf
excluded_local_skills.reason: Generic local skill outside Mythic Edge project governance.

excluded_local_skills.name: playwright
excluded_local_skills.reason: Generic local skill outside Mythic Edge project governance.

excluded_local_skills.name: plugin cache skills
excluded_local_skills.reason: Plugin skills are managed by plugins and should not be vendored into this repo.
